metadata.name: shear
metadata.description: SHEAR — relative-value (ratio) perpetuals on MagicBlock Ephemeral Rollups.

accounts.name: market
docs: so a trader can create their book even while the market is delegated to the ER (a live
session). `Account<Market>` here would fail on L1 mid-session.

accounts.name: vault
docs: The one vault holding ALL physical USDC (LP + trader collateral). Authority = vault_auth.

accounts.name: user_balance
docs: the position owner's balance (receives any dust returned)

accounts.name: liquidator_balance
docs: the liquidator's balance (receives the reward)

errors.name: PositionExists
errors.msg: an open position already exists in this slot

errors.name: InvalidSlot
errors.msg: position slot index out of range

errors.name: SelfLiquidation
errors.msg: a position cannot be liquidated by its owner

errors.name: OICapExceeded
errors.msg: open interest or net-utilization cap exceeded

errors.name: CloseAllFirst
errors.msg: close all open positions before withdrawing

errors.name: FeedMismatch
errors.msg: oracle feed does not match the market binding

types.name: CollateralShuttle
docs: One per trader. A bidirectional staging buffer that lets a trader move real USDC in/out of
their (delegated) `free_collateral` WITHOUT undelegating the live trading accounts.
Seeds: `[b"shuttle", owner]`. Bounces L1 -> ER -> L1:
- L1 `deposit_collateral`: real USDC -> vault, `deposit_amt += amount` (shuttle on L1).
- delegate to ER, then ER `claim_deposit`: `free_collateral += deposit_amt; deposit_amt = 0`.
- ER `request_withdraw`: `free_collateral -= amt; withdraw_amt += amt`.
- commit+undelegate, then L1 `settle_withdraw`: vault -> trader for `withdraw_amt`, zero it.
Both fields name USDC that is physically in the vault but not (yet) counted in `free_collateral`,
so the global invariant becomes:
vault == Σ free_collateral + Σ position.collateral + pool_usdc + insurance_fund
+ Σ shuttle.deposit_amt + Σ shuttle.withdraw_amt

types.name: DepositClaimed
docs: ER: staged deposit folded into spendable free_collateral.

types.name: GlobalConfig
docs: Singleton global config. Seeds: `[b"config"]`. L1-only.  (8 + 134 = 142 bytes)

types.name: LiquidityPool
docs: One per market. Synthetic pool accounting (real USDC is in the vault). Seeds: `[b"pool", market]`.
Pool risk is gated live by `net_oi` (no stored `reserved`). L1 → ER.  (8 + 73 = 81 bytes)

types.name: LpPosition
docs: One per (LP, pool). Seeds: `[b"lp", owner, pool]`. L1-only.  (8 + 81 = 89 bytes)

types.name: Market
docs: One per pair. Self-contained trading params (copied from GlobalConfig at create_market
so the ER needs no GlobalConfig read). Seeds: `[b"market", symbol]`. L1 → ER.  (8 + 148 = 156 bytes)

types.name: MarketRiskParams
docs: Admin: tune the market's risk params (e.g. relax the pool-utilization cap / minimums for a
small devnet pool). Must run while the market is on L1 (undelegate the session first).

types.name: PositionBook
docs: One per (trader, market). Holds up to `MAX_POSITIONS` independent positions so a trader can run
several longs/shorts at once. Seeds: `[b"position", owner, market]`. L1 → ER.

types.name: PositionSlot
docs: One isolated-margin position. Lives inside a `PositionBook` slot. Each is independent
(own side / notional / entry / collateral); they share the trader's free collateral.

types.name: PositionStatus
docs: Closed is variant 0 so a zero-initialized position slot is "available" (not Open).

types.name: UserBalance
docs: One per trader. Free (unlocked) collateral. Seeds: `[b"user", owner]`. L1 → ER.  (8 + 73 = 81 bytes)

types.name: WithdrawRequested
docs: ER: free_collateral debited and staged on the shuttle for L1 payout.
